howItWorks.intro: This prompt engineering roi calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Monthly Savings = Current Spend × Token Reduction %
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: Is prompt engineering worth the investment?
faq.answer: Almost always yes. A 30% token reduction on $5K/month spend saves $18K/year. Even at $3K engineering investment, that is a 500% ROI. Quality improvements add additional value.

faq.question: How much can prompt engineering save?
faq.answer: Well-optimized prompts typically reduce token usage 20-40% while improving output quality. Techniques include few-shot examples, structured output formats, and prompt caching.

howWeCalculate.intro: This prompt engineering roi calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.

Our algorithm applies the relevant formulas using your inputs

Review the detailed breakdown to understand how each factor affects your result
